---
title: "Mila Matich"
image: headshot.png
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mila-matich-63a857263/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/themilamatich
    - text: Email
      href: milamatioch@ucsb.edu
---
       
Hi, welcome to my website! My name is Mila Matich and I am in my third year of my Environmental Studies, Bachelors in Science degree at the University of California, Santa Barbara. Poke around my website to learn about me and my life!
